subcodes.first_line: This is the Book of the Primal Point unto them that have believed in God and His signs, that they may remember within their souls the Most Great Remembrance Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نقطه الاولی لمن آمن بالله و آیاته لیتذکر فی نفسه بذکر الاعظم الذی
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @suffering and imprisonment, @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @spiritual transformation, @return of the Manifestations of God
